summary: Comprehensive testing of DJERBA CONSTRUCTION CRM Backup & Restore System completed. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working including RBAC restrictions.

seed_data_creation: Test user 'test_backup_user@test.com' created for RBAC testing. Multiple test backups created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backup system fully functional. Key features: (1) Manual backup via POST /api/backups creates mongodump in /app/backups/. (2) Automatic backups: every 6h (auto_6h) and daily at 02:00 (auto_daily) via APScheduler. (3) Restore via POST /api/backups/{id}/restore automatically creates pre_restore safety backup first. (4) Retention policy: 7 daily + 4 weekly + 3 monthly. (5) All backup endpoints require super_admin role (level 3). (6) Frontend at /sauvegardes shows stats cards, backup list with type badges, restore dialog with safety backup info. (7) Resend email alerts configured but MOCKED (free tier limitation). (8) Backups stored at /app/backups/ with JSON metadata files.

backup_endpoints: POST /api/backups/{id}/restore - restore backup with safety backup (super_admin only)

frontend_page.restore_dialog: Shows safety backup info before restore

rbac.super_admin: Full access to all backup features

mocked_apis.Resend Email API: MOCKED - configured but limited to verified sender on free tier
